text.data-name:
Thank you for registering for Campus Pride Career Connect - your ONE-STOP career engagement portal creating meaningful, authentic relationships between LGBTQ young adults and employers.
COMING SPRING 2022 :: We are currently in beta-testing with the Camp
text.tspan: Thank you for registering for Campus Pride Career Connect - your ONE-STOP career engagement portal creating
meaningful, authentic relationships between LGBTQ young adults and employers.
COMING SPRING 2022 :: We are currently in beta-testing with the Campus Pride Career Connect. Additional
features will be added every month until we launch to the public this May 2022. Your feedback is appreciated as
we move forward with continued testing.
